name: Fruechte Brot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the pears, apricots, oranges and dried figs.
2. Chop the walnuts.
3. Break up the yeast and mix with 1 teaspoon sugar and lukewarm water. Cover and let stand on a warm place for 10 minutes.
4. Melt the butter and mix with salt and flour. Add the yeast mixture and knead. Cover and let rise on a warm place until doubled in size.
5. Mix raisins, sugar, grated lemon peel, cinnamon, cloves, ginger, cardamom and the dried fruits and nuts; knead them into dough.
6. Form a loaf and place onto a wax paper-covered cookie sheet.
7. Preheat oven to 200°C and bake for 75 minutes.
8. When cool, sprinkle with a little powdered sugar.
